context:
# VisionChat

VisionChat is an [[wiki/concept/ai-powered-customer-support|AI-powered customer support]] platform designed to automate customer care processes for businesses in Vietnam. Initially developed for [[wiki/concept/sme|SMEs]], the Enterprise solution is specifically tailored for medium and large enterprises. Developed to reduce operational costs for customer service departments and enhance the end-user experience, VisionChat addresses key pain points experienced by Vietnamese businesses.

VisionChat leverages a proprietary [[wiki/technology/nlp|NLP]] model for Vietnamese, trained on over 120,000 real-world data samples. This results in an impressive accuracy of 92.3% and a p99 latency of under 185ms, outperforming international solutions not localized for the Vietnamese market. As of October 2024, VisionChat serves 10 active clients, generating a total [[wiki/concept/mrr|MRR]] of 0.53 billion VNĐ/month, with an average [[wiki/concept/nrr|NRR]] of 109% over the last six months.

## Project Status (Q3/2024)

As of the Q3/2024 OKR review, VisionChat is reported to be:
*   **Progress:** 65% complete
*   **Budget:** 2,500 Million VNĐ
*   **Spent:** 1,450 Million VNĐ

## Key Goa

ls

*   Automate customer service processes.
*   Reduce customer service operational costs.
*   Improve end-user experience.

## Problems Addressed

*   Vietnamese businesses spend an average of **40–60%** of customer service costs on repetitive [[wiki/concept/faq|FAQ]]s.
*   Customer service agents handle multiple channels simultaneously, leading to slow and inconsistent responses.
*   Lack of good, affordable [[wiki/concept/ai-customer-service|AI customer service solutions]] with strong Vietnamese language support for [[wiki/concept/sme|SMEs]].

## Target Users (Personas)

| Persona            | Description                                | Primary Pain Point                                  |
| :----------------- | :----------------------------------------- | :-------------------------------------------------- |
| CSKH Manager       | Oversees team performance, reports         | Lack of a unified [[wiki/concept/analytics-dashboard|dashboard]]          |
| CSKH Agent         | Handles tickets escalated from the bot     | Time-consuming context-switching                    |
| End Customer       | Asks about products/services               | Long waiting times outside business hour

s           |

## Product Scope & Features

VisionChat's core features have continuously evolved since its MVP release to provide comprehensive [[wiki/concept/ai-powered-customer-support|AI-powered customer support]].

### Core Components (MVP - Phase 1, generally available)

*   **[[wiki/concept/conversational-ai|Conversational AI Engine]]**: Processes intent classification, entity extraction, and dialogue management. The core [[wiki/technology/nlu|NLU engine]] was released in Q1/2024 (v1.0.0). The model was upgraded to [[wiki/technology/villm|ViLLM-v2]] in Q2/2024 (v1.2.0), significantly increasing accuracy. The proprietary [[wiki/technology/nlp|NLP]] model supports 150+ intent classes and full coverage of regional dialects and specific business contexts within Vietnam.
*   **[[wiki/concept/knowledge-base|Knowledge Base]]**: Allows upload and management of documents (PDF, DOCX, URL) with automatic indexing. Released in Q1/2024 (v1.0.0), with the file upload limit increased to 50MB in Q3/2024 (v1.3.0).
*   **Multi-channel Integration**: Connects seamlessly with [[wiki/platform/zalo-oa|Zalo OA]], [[wiki/platform/facebook-messenger|Facebook Messenger]], [[wiki/platform/web-widget|We

bsite Chat Widget]], and existing [[wiki/concept/crm|CRM]]/[[wiki/concept/erp|ERP]] systems via [[wiki/technology/restful-api|REST API]].
    *   [[wiki/platform/web-widget|Web Widget]]: Initial version released in Q1/2024 (v1.0.0).
    *   [[wiki/platform/zalo-oa|Zalo OA Integration]]: Direct connection to Official Account Zalo, supporting text, image, and quick reply buttons. Released in Q3/2024 (v1.3.0).
    *   [[wiki/platform/facebook-messenger|Facebook Messenger]] integration: Currently in progress (Q4/2024).
*   **[[wiki/concept/human-handoff|Human Handoff]]**: Automatically transfers conversations to human agents when the bot cannot resolve an issue. Initial version was part of Q3/2024 (v1.3.0) with improved escalation logic and priority queue.
*   **[[wiki/concept/analytics-dashboard|Analytics Dashboard]]**: Provides real-time reports on conversation volume, popular intents, self-resolution rates, [[wiki/concept/csat|CSAT]], [[wiki/concept/frt|FRT]], and volume trends by hour. Supports automatic PDF/Excel export. Basic analytics were included in v1.0.0, with Analytics Dashboard v2 featuring funnel analysis and intent heat maps released in Q2/2024 (v1.2.0).
*   **[[wiki/con

cept/admin-portal|Admin Portal]]**: For bot management, intent training, and channel configuration. Initial release in Q1/2024 (v1.0.0), with UI improvements and dark mode beta in Q3/2024 (v1.3.0).
*   **[[wiki/concept/multi-turn-conversation|Multi-turn Conversation]]**: The bot can remember context for up to 10 turns within the same session. Released in Q1/2024 (v1.1.0).
*   **[[wiki/technology/webhook|Webhook]] Support**: Admins can configure webhooks to receive events for new sessions, handoffs, or conversation ends. Released in Q3/2024 (v1.3.0).
*   **[[wiki/technology/api|API]] v2**: A [[wiki/technology/restful-api|RESTful API]] with [[wiki/technology/oauth2|OAuth2]] and a rate limit of 1000 requests/minute. Released in Q2/2024 (v1.2.0).

### Future Capabilities (Phase 2 onwards, now detailed in Roadmap)

Previously outlined as out-of-scope, these capabilities are now part of the detailed product roadmap:
*   Integration with [[wiki/platform/shopee|Shopee]] & [[wiki/platform/tiktok-shop|TikTok Shop]].
*   [[wiki/concept/voice-bot|Voice bot]] capabilities (phone call AI).
*   [[wiki/concept/crm|CRM]] synchronization (e.g., [[wiki/company/salesforce|Salesforce]], [[wiki/company/

hubspot|HubSpot]]).
*   Advanced [[wiki/concept/sentiment-analysis|sentiment analysis]].
*   [[wiki/concept/multi-language-support|Multi-language support]] (English/Vietnamese automatic).
*   [[wiki/concept/white-label|White-label solution]] for resellers.

## Functional Requirements

### Conversational Engine Module

*   **F-01**: The system must classify user intent with an accuracy of ≥ 90% on a standard Vietnamese test set. (As of v1.2.0, the [[wiki/technology/nlp|NLP]] model upgraded to [[wiki/technology/villm|ViLLM-v2]] achieved 92.3% accuracy).
*   **F-02**: The system must identify and extract entities (name, order number, date, phone number) from user queries. (v1.2.0 added 15 new entity types including product codes, invoice numbers, and Vietnamese addresses).
*   **F-03**: The system must support [[wiki/concept/multi-turn-conversation|multi-turn conversations]] (minimum 10 turns per session) with context memory. (Feature released in v1.1.0).
*   **F-04**: Fallback messages when intent is not identified: display suggestions or ask for clarification a maximum of 2 times before escalating to a human.

### Knowledge Base Module

*   **F-05**: Admins must be able to upload PD

F, DOCX, TXT documents (maximum 50MB/file, 500 files/workspace). (File upload limit increased to 50MB in v1.3.0).
*   **F-06**: The system must automatically chunk, embed, and index documents within 5 minutes of upload.
*   **F-07**: Semantic search must return the top-5 relevant chunks with a confidence score.
*   **F-08**: Admins must be able to preview and edit content after indexing.

### Human Handoff Module

*   **F-09**: The bot must automatically escalate when: (a) confidence score < 0.6 after 2 attempts, (b) the customer requests a human agent, (c) urgent keywords are detected (complaint, refund, issue).
*   **F-10**: Agents must receive real-time notifications for transferred tickets.
*   **F-11**: Agents must be able to view the full conversation history before taking over.
*   **F-12**: The maximum wait time for handoff must be 30 seconds (internal [[wiki/concept/sla|SLA]]).

## Non-Functional Requirements

| Requirement         | Metric                                       |
| :------------------ | :------------------------------------------- |
| Latency (P95)       | < 500ms / message                            |
| Latency (P99)       | < 185ms / message (average imp

roved to 185ms as of v1.3.0) |
| Throughput          | 500 concurrent sessions / workspace          |
| [[wiki/concept/uptime|Uptime]]              | ≥ 99.9% / month                              |
| Data retention      | 365 days of conversation data                |
| Security            | [[wiki/technology/aes-256|AES-256]] at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. Data stored in Vietnam ([[wiki/platform/aws|AWS]] ap-southeast-1). |
| GDPR/Data privacy   | Customer data deletion on request within 72h. Compliant with Nghị định 13/2023/NĐ-CP on personal data protection. |

## High Priority User Stories

| ID    | Story                                                      | Priority    | Estimation |
| :---- | :--------------------------------------------------------- | :---------- | :--------- |
| US-01 | As an Admin, I want to upload documents for the bot to learn automatically | Must Have   | 8 SP       |
| US-02 | As a Customer, I want to receive answers 24/7              | Must Have   | 13 SP      |
| US-03 | As a Customer, I want to be transferred to a real agent when needed | Must Have   | 8 SP       |
| US-04 | As a Manager, I want to view an overall performance dashboard | Should Have |

5 SP       |
| US-05 | As an Admin, I want to view and edit the bot's incorrect answers | Should Have | 5 SP       |
| US-06 | As a Customer, I want to chat in both English and Vietnamese | Could Have  | 3 SP       |

## Customer Portfolio

VisionChat currently serves a diverse portfolio of clients across various industries, demonstrating its adaptability and impact.

| Công ty            | Ngành              | Tier       | [[wiki/concept/mrr|MRR]]         | Health Score | Ghi chú                                        |
| :----------------- | :----------------- | :--------- | :--------------- | :----------- | :--------------------------------------------- |
| SaigonBank         | Tài chính – Ngân hàng | Enterprise | 133M ₫/tháng     | 92           | Khách hàng flagship. Renewal rate cao. Đang đàm phán mở rộng. |
| MegaMart Vietnam   | Bán lẻ – E-commerce | Business   | 40M ₫/tháng      | 78           | Hài lòng với tích hợp [[wiki/platform/zalo|Zalo]]. Đang cân nhắc nâng cấp lên Enterprise. |
| TechEdu Online     | Giáo dục – EdTech  | Starter    | 8M ₫/tháng       | 65           | [[wiki/concept/sme|SME]] nhỏ. Sử dụng ổn định nhưng ít tương tác với team support. |
| VinLogistics

| Vận tải – Logistics | Business   | 30M ₫/tháng      | 42           | Churn risk cao. Không hài lòng với accuracy tiếng Việt ngành. |
| FreshFood Co.      | Thực phẩm – F&B    | Business   | 20M ₫/tháng      | 80           | Sử dụng tốt cho kênh [[wiki/platform/zalo-oa|Zalo OA]] đặt hàng. Đề xuất thêm tính năng. |
| PharmaViet JSC     | Dược phẩm          | Enterprise | 75M ₫/tháng      | 88           | Khách hàng dùng cả 2 sản phẩm. Tiềm năng upsell [[wiki/service/mlops-platform|MLOps Platform]]. |

## Pricing Plans

VisionChat offers flexible pricing tiers designed to meet the needs of various business sizes, from startups to large enterprises.

| Gói        | Agents        | Giá niêm yết/tháng | Giá đặc biệt Q4    | Hỗ trợ                    |
| :--------- | :------------ | :----------------- | :----------------- | :------------------------ |
| Starter    | 1–3 agents    | 8.000.000 ₫        | 8.000.000 ₫        | Cộng đồng                 |
| Business   | 5–15 agents   | 20.000.000 ₫       | 16.000.000 ₫       | Business hours            |
| Enterprise | Không giới hạn | Theo thỏa thuận    | Theo thỏa thuận    | 24/7 dedicated [[wiki/concept/customer-success-manager|CSM

]] |

## Service Level and Support

VisionChat offers robust service levels and dedicated support to ensure optimal performance and customer satisfaction. The platform guarantees a 99.9% [[wiki/concept/uptime|uptime]] [[wiki/concept/sla|SLA]]. Enterprise clients benefit from a dedicated [[wiki/concept/customer-success-manager|Customer Success Manager]] and 24/7 technical support available via hotline and a ticketing system.

## Overall Architecture

VisionChat's architecture is designed to handle multi-channel inputs and provide intelligent, scalable customer support.

```
[Zalo / FB / Web Widget]
        ↓
[API Gateway - Kong]
        ↓
[Message Router Service]
     ↙         ↘
[Bot Engine]  [Human Agent Service]
     ↓
[NLU Service (Intent/Entity)] ← [NLP Model: ViLLM-v2]
     ↓
[RAG Engine] ← [Vector DB: Weaviate] ← [Knowledge Base Indexer]
     ↓
[Response Generator]
     ↓
[Conversation Store: PostgreSQL + Redis]
```

Key architectural components include:

*   **Input Channels**: [[wiki/platform/zalo|Zalo]], [[wiki/platform/facebook|Facebook]] Messenger, and a [[wiki/platform/web-widget|Web Widget]].
*   **[[wiki/technology/api-gateway|API Gateway]]**: Powered by [[wiki/techno

logy/kong|Kong]].
*   **Message Router Service**: Directs messages to the appropriate processing module.
*   **Bot Engine**: Core of the AI interaction.
*   **Human Agent Service**: Manages human agent involvement.
*   **[[wiki/technology/nlu|NLU Service]]**: Handles intent and entity recognition, utilizing [[wiki/technology/llm|NLP Model: ViLLM-v2]].
*   **[[wiki/technology/rag|RAG Engine]]**: Interacts with the [[wiki/database/vector-database|Vector DB]] ([[wiki/database/weaviate|Weaviate]]) which is populated by the [[wiki/concept/knowledge-base-indexer|Knowledge Base Indexer]].
*   **Response Generator**: Crafts appropriate bot responses.
*   **Conversation Store**: Uses [[wiki/database/postgresql|PostgreSQL]] for persistent storage and [[wiki/database/redis|Redis]] for caching conversation context.

## Acceptance Criteria

*   Bot answers correctly ≥ 90% of questions in a standard 500-question test set.
*   P95 response time < 500ms under normal load conditions. (Average response time improved to 185ms as of v1.3.0).
*   Zalo and Web Widget integrations function stably for 72 hours before release.
*   Admin portal upload and index documents successfully in 100% of test cases.

*   Human handoff operates correctly under all three defined trigger conditions.

## Deployment Process

The typical deployment process for VisionChat is structured over six weeks, followed by ongoing optimization.

| Giai đoạn            | Hạng mục                    | Nội dung                                                                  |
| :------------------- | :-------------------------- | :------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Tuần 1–2             | Kickoff & Requirements      | Workshop với các stakeholder, thu thập FAQ corpus, thiết lập sandbox environment. |
| Tuần 3–4             | Customization & Training    | Fine-tune intent model theo dữ liệu khách hàng, cấu hình workflow và escalation rules. |
| Tuần 5               | Integration & Testing       | Kết nối API với hệ thống hiện có, kiểm thử End-to-End, User Acceptance Testing. |
| Tuần 6               | Go-Live                     | Chuyển traffic production, monitoring 24/7, daily report trong 2 tuần đầu. |
| Tháng 2+             | Optimize & Scale            | Review metrics hàng tháng, mở rộng tính năng, training thêm intent classes. |

## Timeline

| Phase

| Duration                | Output                                    |
| :------------------------ | :---------------------- | :---------------------------------------- |
| Design & Architecture     | 15/01–28/02/2024        | Tech spec, DB schema, API contract        |
| Backend Core Development  | 01/03–30/04/2024        | Bot engine, Knowledge base, API           |
| Frontend MVP Development  | 01/05–31/06/2024        | Admin portal, Web widget                  |
| Integration               | 01/07–31/08/2024        | Zalo, Facebook, Handoff                   |
| Testing & QA              | 01/09–30/09/2024        | Regression, Load test, UAT                |
| Beta Launch               | 01/10–30/11/2024        | 10 beta customers                         |
| General Availability (GA) | 31/12/2024 (Target Date)| Full customer rollout                     |

## Roadmap

This roadmap outlines the evolution of VisionChat, detailing completed features, current developments, and future plans, as updated on 01/10/2024.

### ✅ Completed (Q1/2024 – Q3/2024)

*   **Q1/2024:** Core [[wiki/technology/nlu|NLU engine]], [[wiki/concept/knowledge-base|Knowledge Base]] indexing, [[wiki/pla

tform/web-widget|Web Widget]] v1.
*   **Q2/2024:** [[wiki/concept/admin-portal|Admin Portal]] v1, Basic [[wiki/concept/analytics-dashboard|Analytics]], [[wiki/concept/multi-turn-conversation|Multi-turn conversation]].
*   **Q3/2024:** [[wiki/platform/zalo-oa|Zalo OA Integration]], [[wiki/concept/human-handoff|Human Handoff]] v1, [[wiki/technology/webhook|Webhook]] support.

### 🔄 In Progress (Q4/2024)

*   [[wiki/platform/facebook-messenger|Facebook Messenger]] integration.
*   Conversation labeling & feedback loop.
*   Bulk intent training from historical data.
*   Bot performance A/B testing.
*   Ra mắt VisionChat 3.0 với [[wiki/concept/voice-bot|Voice Bot]] (Kế hoạch Q4/2024 từ Báo cáo OKR Q3/2024). [!WARNING] [CONFLICT: The existing roadmap lists [[wiki/concept/voice-bot|Voice bot]] (phone support) for Q2/2025. This Q4/2024 plan may represent an accelerated or different version of the feature.]

### 📅 Planned (2025)

| Quarter | Feature | Priority |
|---|---|---|
| Q1/2025 | [[wiki/concept/multi-language-support|Multi-language]] (Anh/Việt tự động) | High |
| Q1/2025 | [[wiki/platform/shopee|Shopee]] & [[wiki/platform/tiktok-shop|TikTok Shop]] integration | High |
| Q2/2025 | [[

wiki/concept/voice-bot|Voice bot]] (phone support) [!WARNING] [CONFLICT: A new Q4/2024 plan mentions "Ra mắt VisionChat 3.0 với Voice Bot". This Q2/2025 plan may be superseded or refer to a later phase of the feature.] | Medium |
| Q2/2025 | [[wiki/concept/crm|CRM]] Sync ([[wiki/company/hubspot|HubSpot]], [[wiki/company/salesforce|Salesforce]]) | Medium |
| Q3/2025 | [[wiki/concept/sentiment-analysis|Sentiment Analysis]] & Alert | Medium |

## Changelog

Detailed release history for VisionChat.

### v1.3.0 – 30/09/2024 🚀

*   **Tính năng mới**
    *   **[[wiki/platform/zalo-oa|Zalo OA Integration]]**: Kết nối trực tiếp với Official Account Zalo, hỗ trợ text, image, quick reply buttons.
    *   **[[wiki/concept/human-handoff|Human Handoff]] v2**: Cải thiện logic escalation, thêm priority queue cho ticket khẩn cấp.
    *   **[[wiki/technology/webhook|Webhook]] Events**: Admin có thể cấu hình webhook nhận event khi có session mới, handoff, hoặc conversation end.
*   **Cải tiến**
    *   Tăng tốc độ response trung bình từ 280ms → 185ms (cải thiện

34%)
    *   Tăng giới hạn file upload [[wiki/concept/knowledge-base|Knowledge Base]] từ 20MB lên 50MB
    *   UI [[wiki/concept/admin-portal|Admin Portal]]: responsive trên màn hình nhỏ, dark mode beta
*   **Sửa lỗi**
    *   Fix lỗi conversation history bị mất khi session timeout sau 30 phút
    *   Fix encoding lỗi khi xử lý text chứa emoji tiếng Việt
    *   Fix bug widget không load trên Safari iOS 16

### v1.2.1 – 05/09/2024 🐛 Hotfix

*   **Sửa lỗi**
    *   **CRITICAL:** Fix memory leak trong [[wiki/technology/nlu|NLU service]] gây crash sau 48h uptime liên tục
    *   Fix lỗi duplicate intent được tạo khi user click Save nhiều lần

### v1.2.0 – 15/08/2024

*   **Tính năng mới**
    *   **[[wiki/concept/analytics-dashboard|Analytics Dashboard]] v2**: Thêm funnel phân tích hành trình hội thoại, heat map intent theo giờ
    *   **Bulk Intent Import**: Admin có thể import intent từ file CSV (tối đa 500 intents/lần)
    *   **[[wiki/technology/api|API]] v2**: [[wiki/technology/restful-api|RESTful API]] với [[wiki/technology/oauth2|OAuth2]], rate limiting 1000 req/min
*   **Cải tiến**
    *   [[wiki/technology/nlp|Model NLP]] nâng cấp lên [[wiki/technology/villm|ViLLM-v2]]: accur

acy tăng từ 88.4% → 92.3%
    *   Thêm 15 entity types mới (mã sản phẩm, số hóa đơn, địa chỉ Việt Nam)

### v1.1.0 – 01/07/2024

*   **Tính năng mới**
    *   **[[wiki/concept/multi-turn-conversation|Multi-turn Context]]**: Bot nhớ context tối đa 10 turns trong cùng session
    *   **Quick Reply Buttons**: Hỗ trợ hiển thị button lựa chọn nhanh trong [[wiki/platform/web-widget|Web Widget]]
    *   **Admin Notification**: Email alert khi bot accuracy xuống dưới ngưỡng cảnh báo
*   **Sửa lỗi**
    *   Fix lỗi widget bị overlap với chatbot bên thứ 3 trên cùng trang web
    *   Fix timezone display sai trong analytics (mặc định về UTC+7)

### v1.0.0 – 30/04/2024 🎉 MVP Release

*   Core [[wiki/technology/nlu|NLU engine]] (Intent classification, Entity extraction)
*   [[wiki/concept/knowledge-base|Knowledge Base]] với PDF/DOCX/TXT indexing
*   [[wiki/platform/web-widget|Web Widget]] v1
*   [[wiki/concept/admin-portal|Admin Portal]] v1 (Intent management, Conversation history)
*   Basic [[wiki/concept/analytics-dashboard|Analytics]] (session count, top intents, resolution rate)

    *   [[wiki/platform/zalo-oa|Zalo OA Integration]]: Direct connection to Official Account Zalo, supporting text, image, and quick reply buttons. Released in Q3/2024 (v1.3.0).
    *   [[wiki/platform/facebook-messenger|Facebook Messenger]] integration: Currently in progress (Q4/2024).
*   **[[wiki/concept/human-handoff|Human Handoff]]**: Automatically transfers conversations to human agents when the bot cannot resolve an issue. Initial version was part of Q3/2024 (v1.3.0) with improved escalation logic and priority queue.
*   **[[wiki/concept/analytics-dashboard|Analytics Dashboard]]**: Provides real-time reports on conversation volume, popular intents, self-resolution rates, [[wiki/concept/csat|CSAT]], [[wiki/concept/frt|FRT]], and volume trends by hour. Supports automatic PDF/Excel export. Basic analytics were included in v1.0.0, with Analytics Dashboard v2 featuring funnel analysis and intent heat maps released in Q2/2024 (v1.2.0).
*   **[[wiki/con

cept/admin-portal|Admin Portal]]**: For bot management, intent training, and channel configuration. Initial release in Q1/2024 (v1.0.0), with UI improvements and dark mode beta in Q3/2024 (v1.3.0).
*   **[[wiki/concept/multi-turn-conversation|Multi-turn Conversation]]**: The bot can remember context for up to 10 turns within the same session. Released in Q1/2024 (v1.1.0).
*   **[[wiki/technology/webhook|Webhook]] Support**: Admins can configure webhooks to receive events for new sessions, handoffs, or conversation ends. Released in Q3/2024 (v1.3.0).
*   **[[wiki/technology/api|API]] v2**: A [[wiki/technology/restful-api|RESTful API]] with [[wiki/technology/oauth2|OAuth2]] and a rate limit of 1000 requests/minute. Released in Q2/2024 (v1.2.0).

### Future Capabilities (Phase 2 onwards, now detailed in Roadmap)

Previously outlined as out-of-scope, these capabilities are now part of the detailed product roadmap:
*   Integration with [[wiki/platform/shopee|Shopee]] & [[wiki/platform/tiktok-shop|TikTok Shop]].
*   [[wiki/concept/voice-bot|Voice bot]] capabilities (phone call AI).
*   [[wiki/concept/crm|CRM]] synchronization (e.g., [[wiki/company/salesforce|Salesforce]], [[wiki/company/

hubspot|HubSpot]]).
*   Advanced [[wiki/concept/sentiment-analysis|sentiment analysis]].
*   [[wiki/concept/multi-language-support|Multi-language support]] (English/Vietnamese automatic).
*   [[wiki/concept/white-label|White-label solution]] for resellers.

## Functional Requirements

### Conversational Engine Module

*   **F-01**: The system must classify user intent with an accuracy of ≥ 90% on a standard Vietnamese test set. (As of v1.2.0, the [[wiki/technology/nlp|NLP]] model upgraded to [[wiki/technology/villm|ViLLM-v2]] achieved 92.3% accuracy).
*   **F-02**: The system must identify and extract entities (name, order number, date, phone number) from user queries. (v1.2.0 added 15 new entity types including product codes, invoice numbers, and Vietnamese addresses).
*   **F-03**: The system must support [[wiki/concept/multi-turn-conversation|multi-turn conversations]] (minimum 10 turns per session) with context memory. (Feature released in v1.1.0).
*   **F-04**: Fallback messages when intent is not identified: display suggestions or ask for clarification a maximum of 2 times before escalating to a human.

### Knowledge Base Module

*   **F-05**: Admins must be able to upload PD

F, DOCX, TXT documents (maximum 50MB/file, 500 files/workspace). (File upload limit increased to 50MB in v1.3.0).
*   **F-06**: The system must automatically chunk, embed, and index documents within 5 minutes of upload.
*   **F-07**: Semantic search must return the top-5 relevant chunks with a confidence score.
*   **F-08**: Admins must be able to preview and edit content after indexing.

### Human Handoff Module

*   **F-09**: The bot must automatically escalate when: (a) confidence score < 0.6 after 2 attempts, (b) the customer requests a human agent, (c) urgent keywords are detected (complaint, refund, issue).
*   **F-10**: Agents must receive real-time notifications for transferred tickets.
*   **F-11**: Agents must be able to view the full conversation history before taking over.
*   **F-12**: The maximum wait time for handoff must be 30 seconds (internal [[wiki/concept/sla|SLA]]).

## Non-Functional Requirements

| Requirement         | Metric                                       |
| :------------------ | :------------------------------------------- |
| Latency (P95)       | < 500ms / message                            |
| Latency (P99)       | < 185ms / message (average imp

roved to 185ms as of v1.3.0) |
| Throughput          | 500 concurrent sessions / workspace          |
| [[wiki/concept/uptime|Uptime]]              | ≥ 99.9% / month                              |
| Data retention      | 365 days of conversation data                |
| Security            | [[wiki/technology/aes-256|AES-256]] at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. Data stored in Vietnam ([[wiki/platform/aws|AWS]] ap-southeast-1). |
| GDPR/Data privacy   | Customer data deletion on request within 72h. Compliant with Nghị định 13/2023/NĐ-CP on personal data protection. |

5 SP       |

## Pricing Plans

VisionChat offers flexible pricing tiers designed to meet the needs of various business sizes, from startups to large enterprises.

| Enterprise | Không giới hạn | Theo thỏa thuận    | Theo thỏa thuận    | 24/7 dedicated [[wiki/concept/customer-success-manager|CSM

]] |

## Service Level and Support

VisionChat offers robust service levels and dedicated support to ensure optimal performance and customer satisfaction. The platform guarantees a 99.9% [[wiki/concept/uptime|uptime]] [[wiki/concept/sla|SLA]]. Enterprise clients benefit from a dedicated [[wiki/concept/customer-success-manager|Customer Success Manager]] and 24/7 technical support available via hotline and a ticketing system.

## Overall Architecture

VisionChat's architecture is designed to handle multi-channel inputs and provide intelligent, scalable customer support.

```
[Zalo / FB / Web Widget]
        ↓
[API Gateway - Kong]
        ↓
[Message Router Service]
     ↙         ↘
[Bot Engine]  [Human Agent Service]
     ↓
[NLU Service (Intent/Entity)] ← [NLP Model: ViLLM-v2]
     ↓
[RAG Engine] ← [Vector DB: Weaviate] ← [Knowledge Base Indexer]
     ↓
[Response Generator]
     ↓
[Conversation Store: PostgreSQL + Redis]
```

Key architectural components include:

*   **Input Channels**: [[wiki/platform/zalo|Zalo]], [[wiki/platform/facebook|Facebook]] Messenger, and a [[wiki/platform/web-widget|Web Widget]].
*   **[[wiki/technology/api-gateway|API Gateway]]**: Powered by [[wiki/techno

logy/kong|Kong]].
*   **Message Router Service**: Directs messages to the appropriate processing module.
*   **Bot Engine**: Core of the AI interaction.
*   **Human Agent Service**: Manages human agent involvement.
*   **[[wiki/technology/nlu|NLU Service]]**: Handles intent and entity recognition, utilizing [[wiki/technology/llm|NLP Model: ViLLM-v2]].
*   **[[wiki/technology/rag|RAG Engine]]**: Interacts with the [[wiki/database/vector-database|Vector DB]] ([[wiki/database/weaviate|Weaviate]]) which is populated by the [[wiki/concept/knowledge-base-indexer|Knowledge Base Indexer]].
*   **Response Generator**: Crafts appropriate bot responses.
*   **Conversation Store**: Uses [[wiki/database/postgresql|PostgreSQL]] for persistent storage and [[wiki/database/redis|Redis]] for caching conversation context.

## Acceptance Criteria

*   Bot answers correctly ≥ 90% of questions in a standard 500-question test set.
*   P95 response time < 500ms under normal load conditions. (Average response time improved to 185ms as of v1.3.0).
*   Zalo and Web Widget integrations function stably for 72 hours before release.
*   Admin portal upload and index documents successfully in 100% of test cases.

*   Human handoff operates correctly under all three defined trigger conditions.

## Deployment Process

The typical deployment process for VisionChat is structured over six weeks, followed by ongoing optimization.

| Giai đoạn            | Hạng mục                    | Nội dung                                                                  |
| :------------------- | :-------------------------- | :------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Tuần 1–2             | Kickoff & Requirements      | Workshop với các stakeholder, thu thập FAQ corpus, thiết lập sandbox environment. |
| Tuần 3–4             | Customization & Training    | Fine-tune intent model theo dữ liệu khách hàng, cấu hình workflow và escalation rules. |
| Tuần 5               | Integration & Testing       | Kết nối API với hệ thống hiện có, kiểm thử End-to-End, User Acceptance Testing. |
| Tuần 6               | Go-Live                     | Chuyển traffic production, monitoring 24/7, daily report trong 2 tuần đầu. |
| Tháng 2+             | Optimize & Scale            | Review metrics hàng tháng, mở rộng tính năng, training thêm intent classes. |

# Auth Service

The Auth Service is a core microservice within the TechVision AI Platform, primarily responsible for handling authentication and authorization across the system. It leverages modern token-based authentication mechanisms such as JWT and OAuth.

## Role and Architecture
The Auth Service operates independently, communicating with other services primarily via REST API. It is deployed on [[wiki/platform/kubernetes]] within [[wiki/platform/aws-eks]].

Key interactions:
*   **[[wiki/platform/api-gateway|API Gateway]]**: The [[wiki/platform/api-gateway|API Gateway]] (powered by [[wiki/platform/kong|Kong]] and [[wiki/platform/nginx|Nginx]]) integrates with the Auth Service for rate limiting, authentication, and load balancing before routing requests to other services.
*   **Admin Portal API**: Tokens, which have a validity of 365 days and can be rotated, are obtained from the [[wiki/service/admin-portal-api|Admin Portal]] settings. The Auth Service likely manages the issuance and validation of these tokens.

## Technical Specifications

| Detail | Value |
| :----- | :---- |
| **Language** | Go |
| **Framework** | Gin |
| **Port** | 8002 |
| **Replicas** | 2 |
| **RAM** | 256

MB |
| **CPU** | 0.25 core |

## Authentication Mechanism

The Auth Service implements a Bearer Token authentication scheme. All API endpoints require a Bearer Token in the `Authorization` header.

Example:
```
Authorization: Bearer <your_api_token>
```

Tokens are obtained from the [[wiki/service/admin-portal-api|Admin Portal]] → Settings → API Keys. These tokens are valid for 365 days and can be rotated as needed. The service uses [[wiki/tech/jwt|JWT]] and [[wiki/tech/oauth|OAuth]] for its authentication mechanisms.

The Auth Service operates independently, communicating with other services primarily via REST API. It is deployed on [[wiki/platform/kubernetes]] within [[wiki/platform/aws-eks]].

Key interactions:
*   **[[wiki/platform/api-gateway|API Gateway]]**: The [[wiki/platform/api-gateway|API Gateway]] (powered by [[wiki/platform/kong|Kong]] and [[wiki/platform/nginx|Nginx]]) integrates with the Auth Service for rate limiting, authentication, and load balancing before routing requests to other services.
*   **Admin Portal API**: Tokens, which have a validity of 365 days and can be rotated, are obtained from the [[wiki/service/admin-portal-api|Admin Portal]] settings. The Auth Service likely manages the issuance and validation of these tokens.

## Technical Specifications

| Detail | Value |
| :----- | :---- |
| **Language** | Go |
| **Framework** | Gin |
| **Port** | 8002 |
| **Replicas** | 2 |
| **RAM** | 256

MB |
| **CPU** | 0.25 core |

## Authentication Mechanism

The Auth Service implements a Bearer Token authentication scheme. All API endpoints require a Bearer Token in the `Authorization` header.

Example:
```
Authorization: Bearer <your_api_token>
```

Tokens are obtained from the [[wiki/service/admin-portal-api|Admin Portal]] → Settings → API Keys. These tokens are valid for 365 days and can be rotated as needed. The service uses [[wiki/tech/jwt|JWT]] and [[wiki/tech/oauth|OAuth]] for its authentication mechanisms.

# Incident Handling Process

This document outlines the standard operating procedure for handling incidents at TechVision AI, covering general system incidents and specific security incidents. The process aims to ensure timely detection, assessment, resolution, and learning from incidents to maintain service reliability and security.

## General Incident Handling Process

The general incident handling process follows these steps:

1.  **Detection**: Incidents are detected via automated system alerts or [[wiki/process/user-report|user reports]].
2.  **Confirmation**: An [[wiki/roles/on-call-engineer|on-call engineer]] confirms the incident within **5 minutes**.
3.  **Severity Assessment**: The incident is assessed and assigned a severity level (P1, P2, P3, P4) based on the [[wiki/concept/severity-matrix|Severity Matrix]].
4.  **Notification**:
    *   **P1**: Immediate notification to the `#incidents` [[wiki/tools/slack|Slack]] channel and ping [[wiki/personnel/cto|CTO]].
    *   **P2**: Notification to `#incidents` Slack channel within **15 minutes**.
    *   **P3-P4**: A [[wiki/tools/jira|Jira]] ticket is created and scheduled for resolution within the current or next [[wiki/proce

ss/sprint|sprint]].
5.  **Investigate & Fix**: The team investigates the root cause and implements a fix.
6.  **Post-mortem**:
    *   For P1 incidents: A [[wiki/process/post-mortem|post-mortem]] analysis must be completed within **48 hours**.
    *   For P2 incidents: A post-mortem analysis must be completed within **1 week**.

### Severity Matrix

| Level | Definition                     | SLA Resolution |
| :---- | :----------------------------- | :------------- |
| P1    | Service down entirely / data loss | < 2 hours      |
| P2    | Critical feature affected      | < 8 hours      |
| P3    | Error affecting some users     | < 3 days       |
| P4    | Minor bug, cosmetic            | < 1 sprint     |

## Security Incident Response

In addition to the general incident handling process, specific procedures apply for security incidents:

*   **Detection**: If a security incident is detected, it must be reported immediately to the [[wiki/personnel/cto|CTO]] ([[wiki/personnel/emp002|EMP002]]) and IT via the secure `#security-incidents` [[wiki/tools/slack|Slack]] channel (email should not be used for initial reporting).
*   **Compromised Device**: If a laptop is suspected of being c

ompromised, the user must immediately disconnect it from the network and report to IT.
*   **Response Time**: The target response time for security incidents is **< 1 hour (P1)**.
*   **Data Protection**:
    *   Absolutely no committing credentials, API keys, secrets, or passwords into [[wiki/tools/github|Git]] (even private repositories).
    *   Use environment variables or [[wiki/tools/aws-secrets-manager|AWS Secrets Manager]] for all secrets.
    *   `gitleaks` pre-commit hook is mandatory to detect secrets before commit.

# Release Process

This document outlines the standard operating procedures and workflows for releasing new features and updates to production at TechVision AI, ensuring stability, quality, and security.

## 1. Feature Development and Deployment Workflow

The development lifecycle culminates in the deployment of features. Key steps relevant to release include:

1.  **[[wiki/role/product-manager|PM]] Sign-off**: After successful [[wiki/role/quality-assurance|QA]] testing on [[wiki/concept/environments#staging|staging]], the [[wiki/role/product-manager|Product Manager]] provides final sign-off.
2.  **Merge to Main**: The `develop` branch is merged into the `main` branch.
3.  **Deploy Production**: The [[wiki/concept/ci-cd|CI/CD]] pipeline automatically deploys the `main` branch to [[wiki/concept/environments#production|production]].
4.  **Monitoring**: The system is monitored for 1 hour after deployment. Alerts are triggered if any anomalies are detected.

## 2. Code Review Process (Pre-release)

A rigorous [[wiki/process/code-review|code review]] process is a mandatory pre-requisite for merging code that will eventually be released:

*   Each [[wiki/concept/pull-request|Pull Request

]] (PR) requires a minimum of **2 approvals**. One approval must come from a Senior+ [[wiki/role/developer|Developer]], and an additional approval from a team lead is required for critical changes.
*   Self-merging of PRs is strictly prohibited, regardless of deadlines.
*   PRs inactive for more than **3 days** will be flagged by the [[wiki/role/product-manager|PM]].
*   Mandatory review checklist includes: logic, security (no hardcoded secrets), [[wiki/concept/unit-testing|unit test]] coverage, and documentation.

## 3. Release Procedures

Specific guidelines are followed for all production releases:

*   **Release Notes**: [[wiki/role/product-manager|PM]] is responsible for writing and distributing release notes via the [[wiki/tool/slack|Slack]] `#releases` channel at least **1 day prior** to the release.
*   **Deployment Schedule**: Production deployments are restricted to **Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday** to avoid critical periods at the beginning and end of the week.
*   **Deployment Timing**: No deployments are to be performed after **17:00 (Vietnam time)**, except in cases of emergency hotfixes.
*   **On-Call Support**: An on-call engineer must be available and actively m

onitoring for **2 hours** immediately following a production deployment.

## 4. Related Processes

*   **Incident Management**: For procedures on handling issues that arise post-release, refer to [[wiki/pipeline/incident-management]]. This includes details on detection, confirmation, severity assessment, and post-mortem analysis.

# Hotfix v1.2.1

Hotfix v1.2.1 was a critical patch deployed to address [[wiki/incident/incident-2024-012]], a P1 incident involving an Out-Of-Memory (OOM) crash in the NLU service.

## Purpose

This hotfix was developed to resolve a specific [[wiki/concept/memory-leak]] issue related to [[wiki/tech-stack/pytorch]] tensor caching in the production environment. The root cause was identified as `torch.cuda.empty_cache()` not being called and the garbage collector not being triggered after each inference request, leading to memory accumulation on GPU.

## Deployment Timeline

*   **Date:** 02/09/2024
*   **Staging Deployment:** 05:30 SA (checked OK)
*   **Production Deployment:** 05:45 SA (memory stabilized)
*   **Owner:** [[wiki/team/ly-ngoc-han]] (ML Engineer)

## Related Incident

*   **Incident ID:** [[wiki/incident/incident-2024-012]] (NLU Service OOM Crash)
*   **Resolution Time:** 2 hours 31 minutes
*   **Impact:** Downtime of 31 minutes, ~420 affected sessions, mitigated by fallback to human agents.

## Post-Hotfix Actions

Following the deployment of v1.2.1, several action items were initiated to prevent similar incidents:
*   Addition of memory usage alerts at a lower thresh

old (70% instead of 90%).
*   Implementation of unit tests to detect memory leaks.
*   Review of all GPU inference code for similar patterns.
*   Establishment of weekly, 48-hour load tests.

input: Ai là người chịu trách nhiệm triển khai Hotfix v1.2.1, mục đích và ngày triển khai của nó?
expected_output: Người chịu trách nhiệm triển khai Hotfix v1.2.1 là Lý Ngọc Hân (ML Engineer). Mục đích của hotfix này là khắc phục sự cố rò rỉ bộ nhớ liên quan đến việc lưu trữ tensor PyTorch trong môi trường sản xuất, do `torch.cuda.empty_cache()` không được gọi và trình thu gom rác không được kích hoạt sau mỗi yêu cầu suy luận. Hotfix được triển khai vào ngày 02/09/2024. (Nguồn: Hotfix v1.2.1)

# Human Resources Department (TechVision AI)

The [[wiki/departments/human-resources-department]] at [[wiki/organizations/techvision-ai]] is responsible for overseeing and implementing all personnel-related policies and procedures. This includes managing leave, compensation, benefits, and the onboarding process for new employees. The department ensures compliance with labor laws and company values, working under the approval of the CEO, [[wiki/people/nguyen-minh-khoa]].

**Version:** 3.2
**Last Updated (Policy):** 01/09/2024
**Effective From (Policy):** 01/10/2024
**Responsible:** Phòng Nhân sự (Human Resources Department)
**Approved By:** [[wiki/people/nguyen-minh-khoa]] (CEO)

## 1. Leave Policy

### 1.1 Annual Leave
Annual leave days are accrued based on the calendar year and do not carry over to the next year, except in special cases approved by the CEO. Employees must notify their direct manager at least 3 working days in advance for annual leave (emergencies are exceptions). Leave requests of 3 consecutive days or more require submission via the [[wiki/software/hrm-system]] and approval from both the Manager and HR.

| Level | Annual Leave Days |
|:---|:---|
| Intern | 6 days

(calculated monthly) |
| Junior (under 1 year) | 12 days |
| Junior – Mid (1–3 years) | 14 days |
| Senior (3–5 years) | 16 days |
| Lead / Manager (over 5 years) | 18 days |
| C-Level | 20 days |

### 1.2 Public Holidays
[[wiki/organizations/techvision-ai]] observes public holidays as stipulated by the State of Vietnam:

*   **New Year's Day:** 1 day (January 1st)
*   **Lunar New Year (Tết Nguyên Đán):** 5 days
*   **Hung Kings' Commemoration Day:** 1 day (10th day of the 3rd lunar month)
*   **Reunification Day & International Labor Day:** 2 days (April 30th & May 1st)
*   **National Day:** 2 days (September 2nd)

### 1.3 Special Paid Leave
Employees are granted paid leave for specific life events:

| Event | Days Granted |
|:---|:---|
| Employee's Marriage | 3 days |
| Spouse Giving Birth | 5 days |
| Death of Parent/Spouse/Child | 3 days |
| Death of Sibling | 1 day |
| Annual Health Check-up | 1 day/year |

### 1.4 Sick Leave
*   Employees may take unpaid sick leave for a maximum of **10 days per year**, requiring a medical certificate from a healthcare facility starting from the second day.
*   For sick leave covered by Social Insurance (BHXH), regulations of Vietnam's Socia

l Insurance apply.

### 1.5 Unpaid Leave
Employees may apply for unpaid leave for a maximum of **30 days per year**, provided they meet the following conditions:

*   Minimum 1 year of employment at the company.
*   Approval from the direct manager and HR.
*   Full handover of responsibilities before leave commences.

## 2. Compensation and Benefits Policy

### 2.1 Salary Structure
*   **Gross Salary** = Basic Salary + Allowances
*   **Net Salary** is calculated after deductions for Social Insurance (8%), Health Insurance (1.5%), Unemployment Insurance (1%), and progressive Personal Income Tax.

**Monthly Allowances:**

| Allowance Type | Amount |
|:---|:---|
| Lunch Allowance | 800,000 VNĐ/month |
| Transportation Allowance | 500,000 VNĐ/month |
| Phone Allowance (Mid-level and above) | 300,000 VNĐ/month |
| Seniority Allowance (after 3 years) | +2% of basic salary/year |

### 2.2 Performance Bonus
Performance is evaluated twice a year, in June and December. Bonus amounts are based on the performance rating:

| Rating | Description | Bonus |
|:---|:---|:---|
| S (Excellent) | Exceeds expectations comprehensively | 3 months gross salary |
| A (Good) | Meets and largely exceeds obje

ctives | 2 months gross salary |
| B (Meets Expectations) | Achieves basic objectives | 1 month gross salary |
| C (Needs Improvement) | Fails to meet some objectives | 0.5 months gross salary |
| D (Does Not Meet) | Fails to complete objectives | No bonus |

### 2.3 Tết Bonus
The Lunar New Year (Tết) bonus is applicable to employees who have worked for a minimum of **3 months** as of December 31st.

*   Minimum bonus: 1 month gross salary.
*   Additional bonus may be awarded depending on the company's business performance.

### 2.4 Annual Salary Review
Salary adjustments are reviewed annually in **April**. The increase amount depends on performance evaluations, market conditions, and the company's budget. The average salary increase for employees who meet or exceed objectives ranges from 8–15% per year.

### 2.5 Other Benefits
*   Private health insurance (provided by [[wiki/organizations/pti]]/[[wiki/organizations/bao-viet]]) for all full-time employees after 3 months of probation.
*   Company-provided laptops based on level (MacBook Pro 14" for Senior and above, MacBook Air/ThinkPad for Junior–Mid).
*   Personal training budget: 5,000,000 VNĐ/year (for courses, workshops, techni

cal books).
*   Company-sponsored teambuilding events twice a year.

## 3. Onboarding Process

### 3.1 Pre-Start Date (T-3 days)
*   HR sends a welcome email with first-day instructions.
*   IT prepares laptops, company email accounts, and system access.
*   Manager assigns a buddy for the new employee.
*   HR prepares the labor contract and employee records.

### 3.2 First Day (Day 1)
*   **8:30:** Check-in at reception, receive access card & employee badge.
*   **9:00:** Meeting with HR — contract signing, company policy explanation, system guidance.
*   **10:00:** Meeting with CEO/Manager — introduction to company culture, orientation.
*   **11:00:** Office tour, team introduction.
*   **12:00:** Lunch with the team (company covers first-day lunch).
*   **13:30:** Computer setup, work tool installation, internal document review.
*   **15:00:** 1-on-1 with Buddy — Q&A session.
*   **17:00:** Wrap-up with HR — gathering first-day feedback.

### 3.3 First Week (Week 1)
*   Review all internal documents in the [[wiki/concepts/knowledge-base]].
*   Complete mandatory training (e.g., [[wiki/concepts/security-awareness]], [[wiki/concepts/company-values]]).
*   Attend team meetings for

observation and familiarization.
*   Daily 1-on-1 with Buddy (15 minutes).
*   End of week: HR check-in (30 minutes) for feedback.

### 3.4 First Month (Month 1)
*   Receive and execute actual tasks with increasing complexity.
*   Weekly 1-on-1 with Manager.
*   Complete the onboarding checklist documentation.
*   End of month: Manager reviews probation progress (first review).

### 3.5 Probation Period
During the probation period, salary is **85%** of the official salary. Upon successful completion of probation, HR signs a contract addendum for official employment, and the salary is adjusted to 100%.

*   **Intern:** 1 month
*   **Junior–Mid:** 2 months
*   **Senior–Lead:** 2 months
*   **Manager–C-Level:** 3 months

input: TechVision AI có cho phép sử dụng công cụ AI để tạo mã và tài liệu cho dự án mới không?
expected_output: Có, TechVision AI cho phép sử dụng công cụ AI để tạo mã và tài liệu cho dự án mới, theo mục 'Permitted Uses' trong 'AI Tools Usage Guidelines'.
context:
# AI Tools Usage Guidelines

This document outlines the principles and regulations for using Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools such as Claude, ChatGPT, and similar platforms within TechVision AI. Adherence to these guidelines ensures productivity, data security, and compliance.

## Permitted Uses

Employees are **permitted** to use AI tools for the following work-related tasks:

*   **Code Generation and Debugging:** Writing code snippets, refactoring, and identifying bugs.
*   **Documentation and Content Creation:** Drafting technical documentation, brainstorming ideas, or summarizing non-sensitive documents.
*   **Brainstorming and Ideation:** Generating ideas for features, solutions, or strategies.
*   **General Information Retrieval:** Asking questions that do not involve confidential company or customer data.

## Prohibited Uses

Employees are **strictly prohibited** from using AI tools in ways that could compromise security, confidentiality, or intellectual property:

*   **Sensitive Data Input:** Do not paste any source code containing secrets/keys, customer data, internal financial information, or other proprietary/confidential company data into external AI tools.
*   **Pr

oduction Code Without Review:** When using AI to write code intended for production environments, always conduct a thorough human review before merging or deploying.

## Related Policies

These guidelines are part of the broader [[wiki/concept/internal-operations-policy|Internal Operations Policy]] and are closely linked to [[wiki/concept/security-policies|Security Policies]], especially regarding [[wiki/concept/data-handling-and-security|data handling and security]].
